headline: Rob Ramirez Joins Inlightened as Head of Strategy
summary: BOSTON, May 05, 2026--Inlightened, the tech-enabled insights platform that connects client companies to a vetted network of healthcare professionals, today announced that Rob Ramirez has joined the company as head of strategy. Ramirez brings 30 years of experience in pharmaceutical market research, healthcare insights, and commercial strategy, including senior leadership roles at Pfizer, Ipsos Healthcare, Schlesinger Group (now Trivoca Health), and, most recently, Manifest Health.

content.title: Rob Ramirez Joins Inlightened as Head of Strategy
content.summary: BOSTON, May 05, 2026--Inlightened, the tech-enabled insights platform that connects client companies to a vetted network of healthcare professionals, today announced that Rob Ramirez has joined the company as head of strategy. headline: Pfizer Stock Edges Higher as Earnings and Revenue Beat Estimates
summary: Pfizer  shares rose slightly in premarket trading after the company delivered a first-quarter earnings beat and reaffirmed its full-year outlook.  The drugmaker posted adjusted earnings of 75 cents a share, ahead of the 72 cents Wall Street had forecast.  Pfizer  reaffirmed its full-year guidance, which it initially provided in December.

headline: Pfizer Beats Earnings Estimates. The Drugmaker Is Finding Life After Covid.
summary: Pfizer  faces a looming patent cliff and evaporating demand for its Covid drugs.  Quarterly revenue rose 2% on an operational basis to $14.5 billion and topped analysts’ calls for $13.8 billion.  Excluding contributions from Pfizer’s Covid franchise, which includes its Comirnaty vaccine and Paxlovid antiviral pill, revenue grew 7% on an operational basis.

content.title: Pfizer Beats Earnings Estimates. The Drugmaker Is Finding Life After Covid.
content.summary: Pfizer  faces a looming patent cliff and evaporating demand for its Covid drugs.  Quarterly revenue rose 2% on an operational basis to $14.5 billion and topped analysts’ calls for $13.8 billion.  Excluding contributions from Pfizer’s Covid franchise, which includes its Comirnaty vaccine and Paxlovid antiviral pill, revenue grew 7% on an operational basis.

headline: Alphabet, Intel, Micron Lead Nasdaq Higher as Oil Drops on Paused Mideast Tensions
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) opened higher Tuesday, with the tech-heavy benchmark riding a familiar trio of tailwinds: a fresh wave of strong earnings, a sharp pullback in crude oil, and a pause in Middle East escalation. headline: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Global pharmaceutical company Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.4% year on year to $14.45 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $61 billion at the midpoint came in 0.6% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.75 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
content.summary: Global pharmaceutical company Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.4% year on year to $14.45 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $61 billion at the midpoint came in 0.6% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.75 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
